Papaya_Leaf_Curl: Remove affected leaves showing curl symptoms immediately
Apply neem oil spray (2-3 ml per liter water) every 10 days
Use reflective mulch to repel aphids that transmit the virus
Spray with imidacloprid 17.8% SL @ 0.3ml/liter to control vectors
Maintain field hygiene by removing weeds that harbor pests
Use yellow sticky traps to monitor and control whiteflies
Apply balanced fertilizer with micronutrients to strengthen plants
Ensure proper spacing between plants for good air circulation
Jowar_Downy_Mildew: Treat seeds with metalaxyl @ 6g/kg seed before sowing
Apply foliar spray of metalaxyl + mancozeb @ 2.5g/liter water
Use resistant varieties like CSH-16, CSH-23, or SPH-1638
Avoid early morning irrigation to reduce humidity
Remove and destroy infected plants immediately
Apply phosphonates @ 2.5ml/liter water as preventive spray
Ensure proper field drainage to avoid waterlogging
Follow crop rotation with non-host crops like cotton or legumes
